items.title: Calculus: Early Transcendentals (Stewart)
items.author: James Stewart
items.note: Multivariable chapters on partial derivatives, gradients and directional derivatives.

items.title: Vector Calculus, Linear Algebra, and Differential Forms (Hubbard & Hubbard)
items.author: John H. Hubbard, Barbara Burke Hubbard
items.note: Rigorous treatment of ∇f, level sets and steepest ascent geometry.

items.title: PyTorch autograd documentation
items.author: PyTorch Team
items.note: How `.backward()` computes gradient vectors for training.

items.title: Deep Learning (Goodfellow, Bengio, Courville)
items.author: Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, Aaron Courville
items.note: Chapter on numerical computation and gradient-based optimization in ML.
